title: The Five Risks of 'Being' in AI: A Systemic View
description: A flowchart illustrating how the five core risks of AI systems—existential, bias, autonomy, privacy, and security—are interconnected and cascade from AI's fundamental state of 'being' to societal impacts.
relationships: The central 'AI State of Being' node connects to and is the root cause of all five risk nodes. Each risk node then independently flows downward to contribute to a collective 'Societal Impact' node, demonstrating their combined effect on public life and policy.
